# GRA Release Radar developer context

GRA Release Radar publishes static agent discovery files and markdown documentation.

Important URLs:
- [OpenAPI](https://gra.caldis.me/openapi.json) documents static discovery resources.
- [API catalog](https://gra.caldis.me/.well-known/api-catalog) lists machine-readable descriptions.
- [Agent JSON](https://gra.caldis.me/.well-known/agent.json) describes capabilities.
- [Root agent JSON](https://gra.caldis.me/agent.json) is a fallback discovery path.
- [A2A card](https://gra.caldis.me/.well-known/agent-card.json) describes A2A metadata.
- [MCP server card](https://gra.caldis.me/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json) is a static MCP card and explicitly states no live MCP transport is operated.
- [Status](https://gra.caldis.me/status.json) describes the static client architecture.

Do not claim GRA has a hosted analysis API, streaming API, CLI, SDK, or live MCP tool endpoint.
